content_body: I just wanted to let you know that we had such a wonderful time staying at your rental property “Skydance”. It is perfect for a romantic getaway or a fun vacation for the entire family. The cabin is beautifully decorated and has every accommodation that you could ask for. From the easy paved drive up to the cabin to the closeness to all the local activities, we found it a perfect location. The bottom floor was perfectly set up for watching movies or to play your favorite x-box games…. not to forget about the pool table ;) The cabin is positioned perfectly for watching the sunset from the Jacuzzi or from any other level of the property. We truly enjoyed ourselves and would highly recommend this to anyone. Thank you again for such a lovely time and hope to be back soon.
title: Wonderful Romantic Getaway with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
